summary: In-game layout editor shipped clean. NEW LayoutEditorOverlayScene.js (303 LOC) + ZuzuGarageScene.js (+5 LOC static property) + config.js (+5 LOC scene registration) + vite.config.js (+40 LOC layoutSaverPlugin). Total 353 / 600 LOC cap. F2 toggles overlay; click+drag layout anchors; Save POSTs to dev-only `/api/save-layout`. Live-preview path (b) save-only fallback chosen — scene.restart() after disk write — defensible given ZuzuGarageScene.createWorld's many side effects. Build PASS 12.74s. Every MUST NOT explicitly preserved.
review_method: Native code-quality-reviewer dispatch SKIPPED per session-scoped protocol (saved memory feedback_skip_native_reviewer_this_session.md). Orchestrator ran the full verification checklist directly: LOC cap, no-new-deps, file-scope, ZuzuGarageScene diff inspection, MUST NOT keyword grep, save endpoint security, build re-verification.

low.summary: Worker chose path (b) save-only fallback for live preview rather than path (a) full re-render. Documented reasoning: ZuzuGarageScene.createWorld() has many irreversible side effects (player constructor, NPC placement, audio transitions, save reads, dialog triggers, upgrade-conditional renders). Save flow: POST → cache.json update → scene.restart(). Sound choice for v1; spec explicitly allowed it.

loadLayout.js was NOT modified (optional file in spec, skipped because path-b save-only fallback doesn't need the window.__layoutEditorWorkingCopy short-circuit). 4 files modified instead of the authorized 5; under-utilizing scope is fine.

Vite middleware registered synchronously in `configureServer` — worker called out the critical timing detail that this must run BEFORE the existing `/api → localhost:3001` proxy that would otherwise eat the request. Defensive design choice; documented in receipt.

Working copy is a deep clone via `JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(...))` — preserves all fields including `_note`, `_world`, `r`, `w`, `h`, `scene`, `version`. Schema-preservation hard rule honored. Object.keys() iteration order in serialization matches insertion order.
F2 hotkey grep returned no matches in src/ — no collision. No alternative hotkey needed.

save_endpoint_security.interpretation: All HARD constraints from spec honored: ../-rejection, absolute-path rejection, layouts/-prefix enforcement, dev-mode-only gating

build.warnings: Pre-existing chunk-size warnings only; no new errors introduced
